name: docker-entrypoint-sh
description: Docker entrypoint script with signal handling, env validation, dependency wait, and exec
code:
#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail

# Signal Handling
cleanup() {
  echo '[entrypoint] Shutting down...'
  kill -TERM "$child_pid" 2>/dev/null || true
  wait "$child_pid" 2>/dev/null
  exit 0
}
trap cleanup SIGTERM SIGINT SIGQUIT

# Environment Validation
: "${NODE_ENV:=production}"
: "${PORT:=3000}"

for var in DATABASE_URL; do
  if [ -z "${!var:-}" ]; then
    echo "[entrypoint] ERROR: $var is not set" >&2
    exit 1
  fi
done

echo "[entrypoint] NODE_ENV=$NODE_ENV PORT=$PORT"

# Wait for Database
echo '[entrypoint] Waiting for database...'
for i in $(seq 1 30); do
  if pg_isready -h "$(echo $DATABASE_URL | grep -oP '(?<=@)[^:]+')" -q 2>/dev/null; then
    echo '[entrypoint] Database ready'
    break
  fi
  [ "$i" -eq 30 ] && echo '[entrypoint] WARN: DB not reachable, starting anyway'
  sleep 1
done

# Run Migrations
if [ "${RUN_MIGRATIONS:-false}" = 'true' ]; then
  echo '[entrypoint] Running migrations...'
  node dist/migrate.js
fi

# Start Application
echo '[entrypoint] Starting application...'
exec node dist/index.js "$@" &
child_pid=$!
wait "$child_pid"
testCode:
code = "#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail

# Signal Handling
cleanup() {
  echo '[entrypoint] Shutting down...'
  kill -TERM "$child_pid" 2>/dev/null || true
  wait "$child_pid" 2>/dev/null
  exit 0
}
tra"
assert 'set -euo pipefail' in code
assert 'trap' in code
assert 'SIGTERM' in code
assert 'exec' in code

name: ci-script-sh
description: CI pipeline script with lint, test, build stages, error handling, colored output, timing
code:
#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail

RED='\033[0;31m'; GREEN='\033[0;32m'; YELLOW='\033[0;33m'; BLUE='\033[0;34m'; NC='\033[0m'

step() { echo -e "${BLUE}[STEP]${NC} $1"; }
ok()   { echo -e "${GREEN}[  OK]${NC} $1"; }
warn() { echo -e "${YELLOW}[WARN]${NC} $1"; }
fail() { echo -e "${RED}[FAIL]${NC} $1" >&2; exit 1; }

START=$(date +%s)

step 'Linting...'
npx eslint src/ --max-warnings 0 || fail 'Lint failed'
ok 'Lint passed'

step 'Running tests...'
npm test || fail 'Tests failed'
ok 'Tests passed'

step 'Building...'
npm run build || fail 'Build failed'
ok 'Build complete'

END=$(date +%s)
echo ''
ok "All stages completed in $((END - START))s"
testCode:
code = "#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail

RED='\033[0;31m'; GREEN='\033[0;32m'; YELLOW='\033[0;33m'; BLUE='\033[0;34m'; NC='\033[0m'

step() { echo -e "${BLUE}[STEP]${NC} $1"; }
ok()   { echo -e "${GREEN"
assert 'set -euo pipefail' in code
assert 'Lint' in code
assert 'test' in code.lower()
assert 'Build' in code
